articles.title: Earendil Labs Doses First Patient with HXN-1001 in P-IIa Trial in Ulcerative Colitis
articles.text:
Skip to content Skip to footer NEWS Earendil Labs Doses First Patient with HXN-1001 in P-IIa Trial in Ulcerative Colitis By Ridhi Rastogi 3 days ago Discover more Drugs & Medications Health Nutrition Shots: Earendil Labs has dosed the first patient with HXN-1001 in the P-IIa trial, & completed enrolment of healthy subjects in the P-I trial across Australia The P-IIa trial will assess the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary efficacy of HXN-1001 vs PBO in ulcerative colitis patients HXN-1001 is a half-life extended anti-TL1A antibody showing superior efficacy vs benchmark assets in preclinical in vitro & animal models, with prolonged in vivo half-life & high-concentration formulation enabling SC administration Ref: PRnewswire | Image: Earendil Labs  | Press Release Related News: Earendil Labs and Sanofi Forge ~$2.56B Deal to Advance Bispecific Antibodies for Autoimmune Diseases PharmaShots, your go-to media platform for customized news ranging across multiple indications. For more information, connect with us at connect@pharmashots.com Tags: anti-TL1A antibody clinical Trial earendil labs HXN-1001 p-iia ulcerative colitis Discover more Biological Sciences Health Pharmaceuticals & Biotech Written by Ridhi Rastogi Ridhi is an avid secondary researcher who follows trends in the biopharmaceutical and healthcare sectors to curate engaging content for the global audience. Shots: Earendil Labs has dosed the first patient with HXN-1001 in the P-IIa trial, & completed enrolment of healthy subjects in the P-I trial across Australia The P-IIa trial will assess the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary efficacy of HXN-1001 vs PBO in ulcerative colitis patients HXN-1001 is a half-life extended anti-TL1A antibody showing superior efficacy vs benchmark assets in preclinical in vitro & animal models, with prolonged in vivo half-life & high-concentration formulation enabling SC administration Ref: PRnewswire | Image: Earendil Labs  | Press Release Related News: Earendil Labs and Sanofi Forge ~$2.56B Deal to Advance Bispecific Antibodies for Autoimmune Diseases PharmaShots, your go-to media platform for customized news ranging across multiple indications. For more information, connect with us at connect@pharmashots.com
Shots:
Earendil Labs has dosed the first patient with HXN-1001 in the P-IIa trial, & completed enrolment of healthy subjects in the P-I trial across Australia The P-IIa trial will assess the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary efficacy of HXN-1001 vs PBO in ulcerative colitis patients HXN-1001 is a half-life extended anti-TL1A antibody showing superior efficacy vs benchmark assets in preclinical in vitro & animal models, with prolonged in vivo half-life & high-concentration formulation enabling SC administration
Earendil Labs has dosed the first patient with HXN-1001 in the P-IIa trial, & completed enrolment of healthy subjects in the P-I trial across Australia
The P-IIa trial will assess the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary efficacy of HXN-1001 vs PBO in ulcerative colitis patients
HXN-1001 is a half-life extended anti-TL1A antibody showing superior efficacy vs benchmark assets in preclinical in vitro & animal models, with prolonged in vivo half-life & high-concentration formulation enabling SC administration
in vitro
in vivo
Ref: PRnewswire | Image: Earendil Labs  | Press Release
